summary: Smart CE Calculator (Thermal Uw) and Sicurezza Cantieri (POS) modules fully tested. All 14 thermal calculator backend tests passed. All 18 sicurezza backend tests passed. Frontend 4-step Certificazioni wizard works with Step 4 'Calcolatore Termico' showing EN ISO 10077-1 formula, glass/frame/spacer dropdowns populated from API, Uw calculation returning correct values (1.74 W/m2K with warnings for Zone E/F non-eligibility). POS wizard 3-step flow works correctly.

backend.GET /api/certificazioni/thermal/referenc: PASS - Returns 8 glass_types, 8 frame_types, 5 spacer_types, 6 zone_limits (public endpoint)
backend.POST /api/certificazioni/thermal/calcula: PASS - Returns Uw calculation with ag, af, lg, ug, uf, psi, total_area, ecobonus_eligible per zone, warnings
backend.Thermal calc with good performance: PASS - Triplo vetro + PVC + Super Warm Edge gives Uw <= 1.0 (Zone F eligible)
backend.Thermal calc with poor performance: PASS - Singolo vetro + ferro battuto gives Uw > 3.2 with all zones failing and warning
backend.Thermal calc medium performance: PASS - Zone D eligible, Zone E fails with appropriate warning
backend.GET /api/sicurezza/rischi: PASS - Returns 13 risks, 14 machines, 13 DPI (public endpoint)
backend.POST /api/sicurezza/: PASS - Creates POS with cantiere, selected_risks, machines, DPI
backend.GET /api/sicurezza/: PASS - Returns POS list with pagination
backend.POST /api/sicurezza/{pos_id}/genera-risc: PASS - AI risk assessment via GPT-4o works

frontend.Landing page: PASS - 'CRM PER FABBRI E CARPENTERIE' badge, 'Il Ferro, Organizzato' heading visible
frontend.Dashboard: PASS - Shows user welcome, menu with all sections
frontend.Certificazioni CE wizard 4-step: PASS - Steps: Progetto, Norma, Specifiche, Calcolo Termico
frontend.Step 4 Formula display: PASS - Shows Uw = (Ag*Ug + Af*Uf + lg*Psi) / (Ag + Af)
frontend.Step 4 Dimension inputs: PASS - Altezza H, Larghezza L, Larghezza Telaio (mm)
frontend.Step 4 Glass dropdown: PASS - Populated from API (8 options with Ug values)
frontend.Step 4 Frame dropdown: PASS - Populated from API (8 options with Uf values)
frontend.Step 4 Spacer dropdown: PASS - Populated from API (5 options with Psi values)
frontend.Step 4 Calcola Uw button: PASS - Triggers calculation and displays result
frontend.Step 4 Uw Result: PASS - Shows 'Uw = 1.74 W/m2K' with correct styling
frontend.Step 4 Zone compliance badges: PASS - Shows A:OK, B:OK, C:OK, D:OK, E:NO, F:NO
frontend.Step 4 NON detraibile warning: PASS - Red badge 'NON detraibile Ecobonus' when Uw > 1.3
frontend.Step 4 Warning text: PASS - Red text 'Uw = 1.74 supera il limite di 1.30 per Zona E'
frontend.Sicurezza (POS) page: PASS - Shows POS list with empty state
frontend.POS wizard 3-step: PASS - Steps: Cantiere, Lavorazioni, Macchine & DPI

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all thermal calculator and sicurezza features verified)

test_credentials: Created test user test-thermal-1772194038664 with session_token for frontend testing, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - used temporary test data cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart CE Calculator thermal transmittance (Uw) calculation fully implemented and working per EN ISO 10077-1. Backend thermal endpoints are PUBLIC (no auth required). Frontend shows 4-step wizard with Step 4 being thermal calculator. Dropdowns populated from /api/certificazioni/thermal/reference-data. Calculation via POST to /api/certificazioni/thermal/calculate. Result shows Uw value, zone compliance badges (A-F), and red warnings when Uw exceeds zone limits. Sicurezza module also fully functional with GPT-4o AI integration for risk assessment.
mocked_api_note: None - all APIs are real including GPT-4o AI integration via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
